title: The Night Train
description: Atmospheric short story. Intermediate vocabulary and pacing.

segments.text: The night train pulled out of the station just before midnight.
Sofia found her seat by the window and watched the platform slide away.
Outside, the city lights blurred into streaks of gold.
She had taken this train many times, but tonight felt different.
In her bag was a letter she had been carrying for weeks — one she still hadn't read.
She took it out and stared at the unfamiliar handwriting on the envelope.

transcript: The night train pulled out of the station just before midnight. Sofia found her seat by the window and watched the platform slide away. Outside, the city lights blurred into streaks of gold. She had taken this train many times, but tonight felt different. In her bag was a letter she had been carrying for weeks — one she still hadn't read. She took it out and stared at the unfamiliar handwriting on the envelope. Then, slowly, she opened it.
